## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation — **please use the [translation PR template](?expand=1&template=translation.md) instead**
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this change locally against a running Home Assistant instance.
- [ ] I have not introduced breaking changes to existing configuration or entities (or described them in the summary above).
- [ ] I have updated documentation if my change affects user-facing behaviour.
